Greenfield Global, Alco Energy Canada, and Grain Farmers of Ontario form the Farms and Fuels Alliance (FFA) to support Canada's ethanol industry.
news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, Greenfield Global Inc. and Alco Energy Canada (formerly IGPC Ethanol Inc), prominent fuel ethanol producers, along with Grain Farmers of Ontario, the largest commodity organization in the province, have unveiled Canada's Farms and Fuels Alliance (FFA). This innovative coalition signifies a partnership between Canada's leading ethanol industry and agricultural sector. The FFA aims to advocate for policies boosting Canadian biofuel production.

news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: The EU still hopes to avoid a scenario of tariff hikes..
EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: The EU will have no choice but to respond to US tariffs.
Crux hires Naggi Asmar as CTO to transform data integration in financial services.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Crux has recently appointed Naggi Asmar, an industry veteran, as its new Chief Technology Officer. The company aims to revolutionize data integration within the financial services sector under his leadership.

news.headline: Jito Foundation partners with FalconX to offer staking returns and MEV rewards to institutional traders. JitoSOL now accepted as collateral.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, the Jito Foundation revealed that Jito Staked Solana (JitoSOL) can now serve as collateral for FalconX. The foundation, responsible for managing growth and adoption of Jito protocols via the Jito DAO, made this important announcement. FalconX, recognized as the largest...

news.headline: Volato Group to present at Roth Conference representing future growth strategies. CEO attending. (Numbers: 37th annual Roth Conference, NYSE American: SOAR)
news.summary: Volato Group, Inc., a prominent player in private aviation trading on NYSE American under the symbol SOAR, has revealed its involvement in the 37th annual Roth Conference. The firm's CEO, Matt Liotta, will be present at the event. Those interested in arranging a personalized meeting can do so by contacting their designated Roth representative. This move aligns with Volato's ongoing initiatives to enhance its functions and establish a solid footing for prospective expansion opportunities.

news.headline: Trump proposes tariffs on auto imports, pharma, semiconductors. Markets red, Natural gas up 5%, FOMC minutes awaited. Gas ETF up 5%.
news.summary: In midday trading on Wednesday, all three major U.S. indices experienced declines as investors reacted to President Donald Trump's proposed tariffs on auto imports, pharmaceuticals, and semiconductors. An official announcement regarding these tariffs is expected by April 2. The markets are also awaiting the release of the latest FOMC minutes to gain insight into the Federal Reserve's policy outlook. The Fed previously decided to maintain interest rates and has indicated no immediate plans for rate reductions.Meanwhile, natural gas futures saw a significant increase of 5%, nearing a two-year high due to the extreme cold weather conditions across the U.S. This has led to a surge in heating demand and the freezing of oil and gas wells, disrupting production. Additionally, the record-setting gas flows to LNG export plants have further contributed to the upward pressure on natural gas prices. The United States Natural Gas Fund (NYSE:UNG) ETF recorded a more than 5% increase in value by midday on Wednesday.

news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: The EU sees no justification for sudden US tariff hikes.
Popular YouTuber shutting down his active ETF.
Trump is stopping NY's congestion pricing by revoking federal approval.
EU Commission VP Sefcovic: Nothing is unfair about trade with the US.
Armenian political prisoner Ruben Vardanyan starts hunger strike in Azerbaijan due to rigged trial.
news.summary: In Baku, Azerbaijan on February 19, 2025, Ruben Vardanyan, an Armenian entrepreneur, philanthropist, and political prisoner, has informed his family that he will cease cooperation in the current trial involving him and other Armenian detainees. Vardanyan cited Azerbaijan's repeated breaches in the judicial process as the reason for his decision.

news.headline: Singapore debut for Robinhood as it highlights growing interest in memecoins, per sources.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global population has reached approximately 7.8 billion people, with over 3.4 billion individuals are using social media worldwide. The study also indicates that there are around 4.66 billion active internet users globally. Furthermore, the data shows that mobile phone users have surged to nearly 5.22 billion, highlighting the increasing reliance on mobile technology. Additionally, it is noted that the number of daily active users on social media platforms has surpassed 3.91 billion, reflecting the pervasive role of social media in people's lives. With the continuous advancements in technology, these numbers are expected to grow further in the coming years.

news.headline: Made4net displaying advanced Grocery WMS solutions at NGA Show 2025 in Las Vegas, showcasing cloud-based Warehouse Management Systems.
news.summary: Made4net, a worldwide supplier of cloud-based Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) and comprehensive supply chain execution software, will showcase its solutions at the National Grocers Association event in Las Vegas on Feb. 19, 2025. Based in Teaneck, N.J., the company is demonstrating their innovative technology for efficient food warehouse management to industry professionals. This exhibition represents a strategic move for Made4net to present their offerings to a broader audience, highlighting the value of their solutions in optimizing warehouse operations. The event is expected to attract a large audience, with hundreds of attendees including industry experts, retailers, and suppliers looking to enhance their logistics processes. Made4net's participation underscores their commitment to driving technological advancements in warehouse management and supply chain operations.

news.headline: NORD releases 10th annual State Report Card with 2024 improvements including Medicaid enhancements. #LegislativeSessionsCharacters: 104
news.summary: In 2024, several significant improvements were made in various states across the country according to the National Organization for Rare Disorders (NORD®). These improvements include expanded Medicaid/CHIP continuous eligibility for children, step therapy reforms, and out-of-pocket prescription cost protections. The enhancements were part of the 10th annual report issued by NORD®, reflecting a positive trend in state healthcare. These changes aim to provide better access to healthcare services for individuals in need. This initiative signifies progress in ensuring affordable and continuous healthcare coverage for children, with a particular focus on minimizing out-of-pocket expenses for prescription medications.

news.headline: Unanet acquires Contraqer to boost GovCons business opportunities with market intelligence. DULLES, Va., Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: Unanet, a prominent provider of project-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) and customer relationship management (CRM) solutions, will amplify its growth suite with enhanced market intelligence and friction-free procurement features. The company made this announcement on February 19, 2025, in Dulles, Virginia. This strategic move aims to bolster Unanet's position in the industry and cater to the increasing demand for efficient digital solutions. With this initiative, Unanet is poised to tap into a market worth billions and propel its expansion prospects significantly.

news.headline: Apple launches budget iPhone 16e to increase sales. Stock unaffected. Reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Apple recently revealed the iPhone 16e, a budget-friendly smartphone aiming to increase handset sales. Following the announcement, Apple's stock remained stable. This move is part of Apple's strategy to enhance its market presence while targeting affordability. The tech giant aims to capitalize on the lower-priced smartphone segment to attract a wider consumer base. The introduction of the iPhone 16e is anticipated to boost Apple's financial performance and expand its market share. Investors and industry analysts are closely monitoring the reception and sales figures for this new budget device.

news.headline: Alibaba stock receives price target hike before earnings report. AI increases investor confidence.
news.summary: Alibaba's stock has received a raised price target in anticipation of its quarterly earnings report for the December quarter, set to be released early Thursday. Investor confidence is being bolstered by the use of artificial intelligence to analyze market trends.

news.headline: Carvana's earnings rise due to recovering unit sales after bankruptcy fears; CarGurus set to release results.
news.summary: Carvana's unit sales have surged, revitalizing the company's earnings following concerns about bankruptcy that caused a decline in shares. The growth trajectory indicates a positive outlook, with an increase in revenue expected. Investor's Business Daily reports that Carvana's earnings are expected to accelerate once again, signaling a strong performance in the upcoming period. Additionally, CarGurus is anticipated to release its earnings report soon, adding to the investor anticipation in the automotive sector. This highlights a potential recovery in the industry, with a promising future for these companies.

news.headline: California fires cause significant losses for home insurance stocks; Investors may be liable. Industry sees positives amidst challenges.
news.summary: Insurance stocks are facing pressure due to significant losses caused by fires and hurricanes. Specifically, home insurance companies are grappling with substantial financial impacts from the California fires. This has raised concerns among investors regarding who will bear the costs involved. Despite this challenging landscape, a detailed analysis reveals a number of positive factors aligning for the insurance industry.

news.headline: Axon stock falls due to analyst downgrade after breakup with tech partner turned competitor. Time to sell?
news.summary: Axon's stock experienced a significant decline from a favorable buying position due to an analyst's downgrade, which emphasized a rift with a former partner who has now become a competitor. This development raises concerns among investors about the company's future prospects and has led to questions about whether it is the right time to sell.

news.headline: 38 counterparties take $73.196 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Microsoft unveils Majorana 1, its first quantum computing chip, marking a significant progress in the field.
news.summary: In a significant development, Microsoft recently unveiled its inaugural quantum computing chip known as the Majorana 1. This marks a crucial milestone in the emerging realm of quantum computing. The introduction of this innovative chip demonstrates Microsoft’s foray into this cutting-edge technology. This announcement underscores the company's commitment to spearheading advancements in the field. The Majorana 1 chip showcases Microsoft's dedication to staying at the forefront of quantum computing research. This unveiling is a pivotal step for Microsoft as it delves into the quantum computing domain.

news.headline: Stock market improves; Dow Jones and S&P 500 edge up, with S&P 500 aiming to turn positive. Buffett favorite rises, telehealth stock surges on deal news.
news.summary: Key stock market indexes saw a decrease in losses, with the S&P 500 striving to enter positive territory. A specific auction stock experienced a significant rally. In the current market scenario, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 have shown improvement. A notable Warren Buffett favorite has witnessed an increase, while a telehealth company has surged due to deal-related news. This live coverage provides updates on these market movements.

news.headline: TrustCo Bank Corp NY declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per share, continuing the annualized payout of $1.44.
news.summary: In Glenville, New York, on February 18, 2025, TrustCo Bank Corp NY (Nasdaq: TRST) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per share ($1.44 per share annually). The dividend is set to be paid out on April 1, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 7, 2025.

news.headline: Anrok selected for G2's 2025 Best Software Awards as top Sales Tax & VAT Compliance solution for fast growth.
news.summary: Anrok, a company based in San Francisco, has recently been recognized in G2's 2025 Best Software Awards as the top Sales Tax & VAT Compliance solution for its rapid growth. This prestigious accolade highlights Anrok's exceptional performance in the industry.

news.headline: WH National Security Adviser Waltz: France’s President Macron and UK's PM Starmer to come to Washington next week.
WH National Security Adviser Waltz: The next step will be technical teams talking details.
WH National Security Adviser Waltz: Chances of a peace deal for Ukraine and Russia are good.
Washington transitions DreamAhead college investment plan to new "WA529 Invest" managed by TIAA with reduced fees & enhanced digital capabilities.
news.summary: TIAA, a prominent manager of 529 plans, has introduced lower fees and improved digital features to enhance the college savings process. The Washington Student Achievement Council (WSAC) is excited to unveil the revamped Washington's 529 college savings plan. The relaunch is set to provide better financial benefits to families planning for higher education. This initiative aims to make college savings more accessible and affordable for residents of Washington. The new features are expected to significantly improve the overall user experience and help families save more effectively.

news.headline: $599 iPhone 16e with AI launched by Apple to boost growth.
Rio Tinto reports strong operating performance with $23.3 billion EBITDA, $15.6 billion net cash from operating activities, and $11.6 billion net earnings.
news.summary: In London, Rio Tinto (LSE:RIO) (ASX:RIO) announces strong financial performance with underlying EBITDA reaching $23.3 billion, despite an 11% decline in iron ore prices. The company generated higher net cash from operating activities amounting to $15.6 billion, attributed to strategic portfolio management and effective working capital practices. Net earnings, or profit after tax for Rio Tinto's owners, stood at $11.6 billion. The company declared a full-year ordinary dividend of $6.5 billion, representing a 60% payout ratio, showcasing a consistent nine-year track record of robust dividends.

news.headline: Rio Tinto to reduce Board size to 12 from 14 by 2025, indicating the conclusion of a transitional period.
news.summary: In London, Rio Tinto has revealed several Board changes, following Chair Dominic Barton's announcement. Over the past year, the Board numbered 14 Directors to maintain expertise and experience during a transitional period for newer members to acclimate. As this phase nears completion, the Board will undergo modifications in 2025. Further details will be provided by Rio Tinto as this transition progresses.

news.headline: Seeking.com launches Selfie Liveness Check for member verification enhancing platform safety. Largest luxury dating platform, aiming for increased trust.
news.summary: Seeking.com, the biggest luxury dating platform worldwide, has announced the introduction of a new verification system aimed at enhancing trust and safety on its platform. The Selfie Liveness Check is the latest feature launched by the platform, which is based in Las Vegas. This update is intended to provide users with a safer online environment while interacting on the platform. The new verification system comes as a response to the increasing need for improved safety measures in online interactions.

news.headline: Ameritas receives 18th Center of Excellence Certification for exceptional customer service.
news.summary: In Lincoln, Nebraska on February 19, 2025, Ameritas' group division achieved a significant feat by obtaining the BenchmarkPortal Center of Excellence Certification for the 18th year in a row. This award serves as a testament to their unwavering commitment to providing exceptional customer service and support.

news.headline: AquaTech Eco Consultants will plant 1 million eelgrass plants in Lake George for FWC restoration project.
news.summary: A company called AquaTech Eco Consultants has recently revealed details about their new environmental restoration project, in collaboration with the Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission. The project, known as the St. Johns River Eelgrass Revegetation Project, is a large-scale initiative aimed at restoring the eelgrass population in the St. Johns River. This project is significant as it involves the restoration of a vital aquatic ecosystem.

news.headline: Konstellate launches AI platform for Pharma Decision-Makers, gaining rapid adoption, provides insights from top experts.
news.summary: A groundbreaking platform is experiencing swift growth in the pharmaceutical sector as it offers key decision-makers convenient access to consolidated digital insights from top healthcare experts. This platform, unprecedented in its kind, has seen a surge in user adoption. The platform is based in New York and the significant date is February 19, 2025.

news.headline: RevRise Media sees significant growth, expanding from 4 founders to 12 in 3 years. Ambitious plans for insurance-tech industry.
news.summary: In San Diego on February 19, 2025, a team of 12 individuals, including four original Founders who started three years ago, are making strides in the insurance-technology sector with innovative ideas. Their team has grown from four to 12 members, showcasing their ambitious plans for the industry. They are focused on pioneering new concepts and fresh perspectives within insurance, reflecting a notable expansion from their humble beginnings. Lead acquisition in the insurance realm, a critical aspect of their growth trajectory, has seldom seen such rapid advancements.

news.headline: 'Zoo' game on Telegram initiates airdrop claims as it nears TON token launch after finishing mining phase.
news.summary: The widely-known Telegram game Zoo has transitioned from its mining phase and is now offering airdrop claims in anticipation of its token release on The Open Network (TON).

news.headline: Coinbase urges Congress to give CFTC control over digital assets, shifting oversight from SEC.
news.summary: Representatives from the cryptocurrency sector are actively advocating in Congress to transfer regulatory control of digital assets from the SEC to the CFTC. This move is being pursued as a means to address concerns and establish clear regulatory guidelines for the industry. The CFTC would potentially oversee the regulation of cryptocurrencies and other digital assets if the transition occurs. This effort comes amidst a growing market cap of over $2 trillion for the overall cryptocurrency market, highlighting the importance of establishing effective regulatory frameworks.

news.headline: Ivanti announces 2024 Partner of the Year Award winners in Salt Lake City, celebrating top-performing partners.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Ivanti, a software company facilitating seamless integration between IT and security for optimal work environments, disclosed the victorious recipients of the 2024 Partner of the Year Awards. The accolades honor leading partners who have showcased outstanding outcomes and contributed significantly through their collaboration in the previous year. Michelle Hodges, the SVP of Global Sales, expressed pride in acknowledging and honoring the exceptional partners and their accomplishments.

news.headline: Blueprint Sports acquires SANIL, creating a $100M+ NIL powerhouse agency. In 2024 they delivered $108M in NIL payments.
news.summary: Blueprint Sports, a prominent agency specializing in Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) services for college athletic departments and student-athletes, has recently acquired SANIL, a key player in the NIL field. Together, they raised and distributed a noteworthy $108 million in NIL payments to student-athletes from 70 collegiate athletic departments in the year 2024. This acquisition solidifies their position as leaders in the industry, showcasing their ability to generate substantial revenue for student-athletes through effective NIL strategies.

news.headline: USSBC takes 12 AAM companies to Saudi Arabia for business mission from Feb 3-6, 2025. Exciting developments in air mobility sector.
news.summary: A delegation of 12 advanced air mobility companies, led by the U.S.-Saudi Business Council (USSBC), undertook a business development trip to Jeddah and Riyadh, Saudi Arabia from February 3-6, 2025. The delegation showcased state-of-the-art AAM products in a bid to foster business relationships.

news.headline: PPL's campaign raised $9 million to aid communities, employees, and retirees.
news.summary: In Allentown, Pennsylvania, on February 19, 2025, employees and retirees of PPL Corporation, along with contributions from PPL's affiliated foundations, committed close to $9 million in donations through PPL's yearly employee-run charitable fundraising effort. This significant amount raised will be utilized in collaboration with...

news.headline: US 20-Year Bond Auction
Arista Networks reports 25% Q4 growth with $1.93B sales, surpassing expectations; Analysts maintain Neutral rating.
news.summary: Despite reporting positive fourth-quarter results, shares of Arista Networks Inc (NYSE:ANET) were trading lower. In an exciting earnings season, the company posted sales of $1.93 billion, marking a 25% increase year-on-year and surpassing Street predictions by 1.5%. Analyst James Fish of Piper Sandler reiterated a Neutral rating but upped the price target from $106 to $108. He noted that the growth was fueled by Services, although product billings slowed to 20%. CATs (Cloud & AI Titans) accounted for 48% of full-year revenues. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nodal Exchange to expand headquarters in Fairfax County, increasing capacity at 1921 Gallows Road. Governor announces.
news.summary: Earlier today, Governor Glenn Youngkin revealed that Nodal Exchange is set to expand its headquarters at 1921 Gallows Road in Tysons, increasing capacity and potentially creating more job opportunities in the area.

news.headline: LDA introduces advanced healthcare data integration solution to transform data archiving and management.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on February 19, 2025, a prominent healthcare data archiving and integration provider, Legacy Data Access (LDA), revealed its latest innovation - an advanced data integration solution. This cutting-edge tool aims to revolutionize the way healthcare providers handle historical data.
